temples.name: Shree Sai Baba Samadhi Mandir
temples.description: The Samadhi temple at Shirdi, administered by Shree Saibaba Sansthan Trust, Shirdi.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Ghrishneshwar Temple
temples.description: A Jyotirlinga shrine at Verul near Ellora, restored in the 18th century under the patronage of Ahilyabai Holkar.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Tulja Bhavani Temple
temples.description: A major Shakti shrine at Tuljapur, deeply associated with Maharashtra's devotional and Maratha history.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Aundha Nagnath Temple
temples.description: A major Shiva shrine at Aundha Nagnath, presented by Maharashtra Tourism as a significant spiritual and heritage destination.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Mahalaxmi Temple, Kolhapur
temples.description: A revered Shakti Peetha in Kolhapur, also known as Ambabai Temple, highlighted by Maharashtra Tourism.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Shree Siddhivinayak Ganapati Mandir
temples.description: A major Ganesha temple at Prabhadevi in Mumbai, first consecrated in 1801 according to the temple trust.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Trimbakeshwar Shiva Temple
temples.description: A revered Jyotirlinga shrine in the spiritual town of Trimbak, near Nashik.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Bhimashankar Temple
temples.description: A Jyotirlinga temple in the Sahyadri hills, also associated with the Bhimashankar Wildlife Sanctuary.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Shri Vitthal-Rukmini Mandir
temples.description: The central pilgrimage temple of Pandharpur, dedicated to Shri Vitthal and Rukmini and highlighted by Maharashtra Tourism.
temples.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
temples.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.
